title: Add Project Manager and Location Contact fields

requirements.summary: Add Project Manager text input field to the ReportForm component in the Project Info section, include it in ReportData interface, and render it in the generated PDF under project info
acceptanceCriteria: A labeled 'Project Manager' text input appears in the ReportForm within the project info section
The entered value is stored in form state
The Project Manager name appears in the generated PDF report under project info
The ReportData interface includes a projectManager field

file_operations.description: Add projectManager field to the ReportData interface and update the generatePDF function to render the Project Manager value in the project info section of the PDF, placing it after the project name field

Add a projectManager state field to the form state, add a labeled text input for 'Project Manager' in the Project Info section (after the project name input), bind it to the state, and pass the projectManager value to the pdfGenerator when generating the report

requirements.summary: Add Location Contact text input field to the ReportForm component in the Project Info section, include it in ReportData interface, and render it in the generated PDF under project info
acceptanceCriteria: A labeled 'Location Contact' text input appears in the ReportForm within the project info section
The entered value is stored in form state
The Location Contact name appears in the generated PDF report under project info
The ReportData interface includes a locationContact field

file_operations.description: Add locationContact field to the ReportData interface and update the generatePDF function to render the Location Contact value in the project info section of the PDF, placing it after the Project Manager field

Add a locationContact state field to the form state, add a labeled text input for 'Location Contact' in the Project Info section (after the Project Manager input), bind it to the state, and pass the locationContact value to the pdfGenerator when generating the report
